title: Creating Albums
drDigitalIntro:
Albums are folders for your photos.
• Make albums like "Vacation 2024", "Family", or "Recipes".
• A photo can be in several albums at once.
• Adding to an album doesn't move or copy the photo.

playgroundTask.goal: You created an album and added photos to it

steps.say: Click the + New Album button to create a new album.
Now click the Dog at the Park photo to open it.
Click Album to add it to your Vacation album.
Click Back, then open Beach Vacation.
Add Beach Vacation to the Vacation album.
Click the Vacation album in the sidebar to see your photos.

drDigitalSuccess: You created an album and added photos to it! Albums are a great way to keep related photos together.
drDigitalHint: Click + New Album, name it, then open a photo and click Album to add it.
